name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Good news: elective procedures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The Hoosier spirit is alive and well, and that's made a significant difference in where we find ourselves today. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4d7ec8c29b504d3ba65680359dfac1f9&_e=ZPK6yUNgvPv6OYXJCDurjNAYdBOqIXrH0UbZysztHTChCi_NIbt5doU6wXZ9tubw9aDnt59CdeDPbLIB1DYJrE3waGHy0Y75854QWGAKG3nHPhGwS3DTXKZEnBKBiC6JGyAKAc2eLJr5ZMf4_KtH_Eq0aq-T71vcBXUEJwcYtA6-J51d6-d7qGgXO91wRAlikyOhUwB7l0_ppVeldsLYxUqW_MM0gMiZURHrkG2WyI__QiCkmuWrwe7TtSz9G-Jmw31HgpvkMudlXdm4AsCy3DCm9AwI6mx_AHxocJdJEUL95FqO6syog_gJixXxGz-tP6dSLGXt4_HXD-l6uB_RjNZAPIPHhqnY_OZ8vvbA5wzezoxLmXR-F6pkAHYH0T-4C8YQAX27eueYxUjNbWCR7RrcO9EiiG0cOQWqWGNedo7xsey5OaDtdFILF1FM9Zd-) |

Friend,

_**"The Hoosier spirit is alive and well, and that's made a significant difference in where we find ourselves today."**_
**-Gov. Holcomb**

Today, Governor Holcomb renewed Indiana’s order for Hoosiers to stay hunkered down, but _**we’ve got some good news to report as we look down the road of re-opening Indiana’s economy.**_

The first stage starts tomorrow, as _**hospitals will be cleared that they should conduct medically necessary procedures,**_ such as those determining cancer diagnosis and cardiac issues, respiratory procedures, and procedures to reduce significant pain.

Then – if our supply inventory continues to hold up – Indiana will open up more elective procedures next week.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4d7ec8c29b504d3ba65680359dfac1f9&_e=ZPK6yUNgvPv6OYXJCDurjNAYdBOqIXrH0UbZysztHTChCi_NIbt5doU6wXZ9tubw9aDnt59CdeDPbLIB1DYJrE3waGHy0Y75854QWGAKG3nHPhGwS3DTXKZEnBKBiC6JGyAKAc2eLJr5ZMf4_KtH_Eq0aq-T71vcBXUEJwcYtA6-J51d6-d7qGgXO91wRAlikyOhUwB7l0_ppVeldsLYxUqW_MM0gMiZURHrkG2WyI9qt22gNNUOl0i-DatYxISTUiJFDWjuNvX_OWy2ClF9PthJClQ_WdMy9feKf0DW-uf25OszQGtmbx-RA9sqgGFaEDTFqOP8X0mL5cuhUkqQlA4k0Nuji9fL-3yATGmcPoHV5PLPgsJZFS89bTogVzQt6dkk7RpOaJebMhWUxY3PJpJMowjvI5_wk5q7s-mBA4e2J-NL0xczVo7C_n9qxCeX)
[ **Gov. Holcomb Says Why We’re Able to Restart Elective Procedures** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4d7ec8c29b504d3ba65680359dfac1f9&_e=ZPK6yUNgvPv6OYXJCDurjNAYdBOqIXrH0UbZysztHTChCi_NIbt5doU6wXZ9tubw9aDnt59CdeDPbLIB1DYJrE3waGHy0Y75854QWGAKG3nHPhGwS3DTXKZEnBKBiC6JGyAKAc2eLJr5ZMf4_KtH_Eq0aq-T71vcBXUEJwcYtA6-J51d6-d7qGgXO91wRAlikyOhUwB7l0_ppVeldsLYxUqW_MM0gMiZURHrkG2WyI_KJOTVMORGrtSD8Kqb3vFWXK-nChZjukLzMlGsnqe3AfsKWQYWYVlLGNhaxcBM3VdrUElEts0AMLtjDDapUrhp4nB4iSivpYesZGcB0bbrx8DuJk4Gd8gxSKLztrvDCyoT-YNPECU7cQFOGK2VVM4Bx30i14H_NeLgq_n7We6TGZGhQvFS7L6uA04wsfTLtAA7zod8BddBYGf3CNTTMEvD)
What’s allowing us to make this progress? Governor Holcomb said it’s two things:
* _**First, it’s you.**_ You’re practicing social distancing, and that’s helped flatten the curve.
* _**And it’s our state’s world-class healthcare networks,**_ which have collaborated to provide the resources we need to fight this pandemic.

The work you’re doing is making a difference, and there is a light at the end of this tunnel.

_**It’s the work of our state’s 16,705 licensed physicians. It’s our 152,000 licensed nurses. And it’s every single Hoosier who has stayed home and practiced safe social distancing that has helped get us to this point of looking at the first stages of reopening Indiana’s economy.**_

#INThisTogether
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: David Hill
subject: Nancy Pelosi and Kendra Horn Hold Small Biz Hostage AGAIN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
Allowing America’s small businesses to keep their doors open is essential for our economy, especially during these challenging and uncertain times. Dear Peter, Allowing America’s small businesses to keep their doors open is essential for our economy, especially during these challenging and uncertain times. Small businesses employ millions of people across our country and thousands in Oklahoma. It is crucial they receive the resources they need to pay their employees so American families can continue putting food on the table during the COVID crisis. Unfortunately, Speaker Pelosi and Democrat Kendra Horn are blocking this much-needed relief. In fact, these vital resources have been held up by House Democrats for two full weeks! Due to the timely nature of this ongoing global health pandemic, we are attempting to get this information to as many voters as possible. We are asking you to support our mission to STOP Pelosi and Kendra Horn from continuing to block vital resources that families and small businesses rely on during these unprecedented times. [ **Support Our Mission >>>** ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=aba21238601e4b1ab57f39226547fa92&_e=ZnchOeFspACEKPHy72ltEmzzuQ3Xbd76NBoFSkR_6TYu5CRJltSf6lw0HUDXMhYas8V9mWw7ERvEVG4oWM_UtGaFQc4bjpDxDtGuprT51IDEJDVrsSTmBlRBmd5mg8cfdIlWeavek3c1gQvyrfeKckqCCbHIjKHt7RYH6pTCLbhhTj6BVZu1TL3gk4tljc2ifllxDKyeny9gIXU3oQaWSPEhaI_QjYyOPkUGxYlPatJlnlW52hKhV8GSo29-XcbKC90eZHbGksM4XztdY2ai8HJznGnYgmYH0g3oi4_aTb0xVJJouD_gEXJU57UA6Rlht2xQSNnaiHODG4Fmb4a-_FfxxQfz_XTcsIhYSYWvLDgWKqZM3fM8H4R_JofdMfAEphkGBNnaPvke5DvYuU9L9bEAZVjwkomGMDSw55qH3OI%3D) Like President Trump, I have years of private sector experience. I understand what it takes to run a business and how important it is to take care of hardworking employees. Kendra Horn either doesn’t understand how to help hardworking Americans, or she doesn’t care. Either way, we need leaders who are willing and able to work for us, not the special interests. We deserve a representative who has our back. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Save USPS [Sign if you agree]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901c2/55b66746/23bb1772/80e71c4/3895741416/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | For weeks, Joe has been calling for national vote by mail, because no one should have to put their lives at risk to go cast their vote. But with news breaking that the US Postal Service's funding is in jeopardy, vote by mail is being put at risk. We need any vote by mail system to be efficient and secure - but we can't do that unless the USPS is fully funded. **We must protect the United States Postal Service. Sign your name if you agree.** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901c2/55b66746/23bb1772/80e71c5/3895741416/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/save-the-usps-e") Now more than ever, we all rely on the USPS. The folks out there delivering our packages and mail are keeping our nation running, and if we want to safely and securely institute national vote by mail, we must make sure the USPS receives full funding. No exceptions. **We must keep this essential service running.** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901c2/55b66746/23bb1772/80e71c5/3895741416/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/save-the-usps-e") The frontline workers with the USPS have had our backs throughout this crisis -- now, we need to have theirs. Be well. Stay healthy. Stay safe. Team Kennedy |
---|---|---

name: Team Christy
subject: BREAKING: Trump endorsed and is fundraising for Garcia on Twitter. Fight back now! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | | Trump just endorsed our opponent and is fundraising for him on Twitter [FIGHT BACK](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7d/29776869/a2bd4d3/569f5224/758619499/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfVHJ1bXBFbmRvVHdlZXQifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_TrumpEndoTweet")
---

Peter --

Instead of working on our nation's response to COVID-19, this is what Trump is doing tonight. Not just endorsing our opponent but directly fundraising for him:

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7d/29776869/a2bd4d3/569f5224/758619499/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfVHJ1bXBFbmRvVHdlZXQifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_TrumpEndoTweet")
---

Last week dark money groups poured in nearly $900,000 to try and steal this seat.

Now Trump is firing up millions of his followers to flood Mike Garcia's coffers. There are just 3 weeks until this election. And Trump thinks he can flip this seat and help his own momentum going into November.

We cannot let that happen.

**[If you can, please make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can RIGHT NOW so we can fight back.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7d/29776869/a2bd4d3/569f5224/758619499/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfVHJ1bXBFbmRvVHdlZXQifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_TrumpEndoTweet")**

And they don’t want no-fault voting by mail to outlast the pandemic. them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17207292/186610663/-933379051?express_lane=true&amount=8&refcode=VBM.Rightsexpress_lane_8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc2ZGE0NC1hYjgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ZdiNzR-wl_JP6Y67hJTdVIu_BANVT9Jw4XKEEsGznQ=) name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 4/20
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
Friends,

We can see the light at the end of the tunnel. The curve is starting to flatten. While the fight is not over, we can start to see an end to this pandemic.

I know many of you are worried about your jobs and want to start opening Tennessee again. Last week, [https://www.drmannyforsenate.com/vertical-containment-is-the-way-forward-to-get-tennessee-and-america-back-to-work-a-public-health-and-economic-strategic-agenda] I released a plan to get America back to work and get our economy back on track! [https://www.drmannyforsenate.com/get-the-country-back-to-work] We must stick together to make sure we fully beat this thing.

As always, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com].

News:

I've been saying it for months: The Chinese government is directly responsible for this pandemic and we must hold them accountable. We cannot continue to rely on the Communist Chinese government for our neccessary medical supplies. We must put American health back in American hands and end our reliance on China! Read about my plan to bring drug manufacturing back to the United States. [https://www.drmannyforsenate.com/dr-manny-calls-for-putting-american-health-in-american-hands]

There's also been lots of talk about a disparity between the folks who are getting COVID-19, and folks that aren't getting it. Read my commentary in the Tennessee Star! [https://tennesseestar.com/2020/04/15/manny-sethi-commentary-its-not-about-discrimination-its-about-prevention/]

And lastly, I went on Fox News last week to discuss updates from the front lines of COVID-19. Click here to watch my full interview! [https://www.facebook.com/drmannyforsenate/videos/2987313938001651/?__tn__=kC-R&eid=ARASkH87iAgU6jbTN-9HyZW0YrsilICxu3_Gs1CHT_Jdmc17qqcvz9pY-PTadSJnZFwVIBvS89ykL0-h&hc_ref=ARS3NUTL70-Lk0FhZs5F9qE9wW4CttJyfXSbpAoBjR-l8bcO4Nx6tUrPSOrp48UK4nU&fref=nf&__xts__[0]=68.ARA3kIzp7mT8_E_tp_looeBLMdOHBXA0W07zNC4WoloqI35gBau4IJdLTG25cXZ4tO45r4ykRJaDYnERqGOJkrMRBXDBXx5gXkrJ3HV9QA7Q3V53kv-T28SG3Yw5mEg_RhWdYAhydqYDg5Tdcg1VYfxfNJf_Vq_xO1LwIrv6Vwcjdpd6emFIfZHiK8HzTjPF9-AqxQpiadHUsqQIT5dEDKpKxd-DgT-stGDNfZyg0_jhQjm-18T6zgceyxQwGOZ0TdbBmTpMCYbxHevvxXpCEaE7iKr57Oufe8gq-67-7oqL8ADFmM43yGcz8zVYGxERioDx7Prvmt7mwVMGDceDWEZ2U7qw5ZJBWN85yYputgC2JqD6BFHpVd6ZwQ]

Social Media:

On our Tuesday town hall, we highlighted Diana Murphy, who operates the Tellico Plains Food Pantry and Thrift Store. It was great to hear about how they are responding to the coronavirus pandemic. Right now, the Food Pantry and Thrift Store of Tellico Plains needs donations and nonperishable food. Please consider donating to such a great organization working to keep our most vulnerable fed during this pandemic!

Follow us on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/drmannyforsenate/], Twitter [https://twitter.com/DrMannySenate], and Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/drmannysenate/] to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August!

COVID-19 Resources:

There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please adhere to the guidelines being put forth by President Trump [https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/coronavirus-guidelines-america/], Governor Lee [https://www.tn.gov/governor/covid-19.html], and the CDC [https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html].

One of the most important things any of us can do is to go give blood!

I know you are all worried. There is a light at the end of the tunnel, and we will get there together. I sure can't wait to get back out on our big orange bus and visit every corner of Tennessee!

Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of us!

Dr. Manny

P.S. I know you don't want to be hearing from politicians right now. That is one reason we need to send political outsiders to Washington. Please consider donating to our campaign to send me to Washington to represent you in the US Senate!

DoNATe herE [https://manny.revv.co/donate]

Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.

Our mailing address is:

PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205

Paid for by Dr. Manny for U.S. Senate UNSUBSCRIBE https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jhkuuljt-olhhkyhhid-m/

name: Kimberley Boggus
subject: It's early, I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I know it's early in the morning and many of us are locked in, but I have big news -- we are launching our TV ad today!
|
---

| | Hi crew, I know it's early in the morning and many of us are locked in, but I have big news -- we are launching our TV ad today! I'm asking for 100 new donors to step out and step up before noon today. I want to show the ad in another market in Iowa, and 100 donors will make that feasible. Can you chip in? Here's a link we've been using if you can: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a1/33365068/4a75f467/3f8bf572/3063427151/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200421_launchday_em_fr_all_ftr") Thanks, and look for the Admiral's ad on your TV. -Kimberley Sent from my iPhone
---

name: Team Tom
subject: We haven’t seen you in awhile, friend. We miss you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winter for Montana
body:
TOM WINTER FOR CONGRESS [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74435/images/TW_LOGO_ALT.png]
We are going to get through the coronavirus outbreak together. If you are experiencing symptoms or are looking for more information, you can visit the website of the CDC [https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/about/index.html?emci=063a651b-7f65-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=32ffc595-8965-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=3572828] or the Montana Department of Public Health and Human Services. [https://dphhs.mt.gov/publichealth/cdepi/diseases/coronavirusmt] We are closely monitoring the situation and its effects on the people of Montana and our nation as we work together to keep our families and communities safe.

Hi friend,

We noticed you haven’t opened our emails in awhile. That’s okay — we know it has been a really tumultuous time. But this crisis shows us that now, more than ever, we desperately need change in Washington.

That’s why we think it’s extremely important to stay engaged with the campaign and our vision to move Montana forward.

Here’s a reminder of the issues that serve as the beating heart of our campaign:

Healthcare for all,
Fair wages and a working economy,
Preserving our natural resources,
And a government that puts people before big corporations.

We’re not asking you for money, just that you stick with us as we talk to voters virtually, learn what issues matter most to you, and continue to strengthen our message in a changing political climate.

Tell Tom that you’re still with us >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EO05OqUleUeT2y8cyT7-Og2]

Thanks for your support,

Team Tom

ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/EO05OqUleUeT2y8cyT7-Og2]
Rep. Tom Winter proudly represents Montana’s 96th district in the State House. In 2018, Tom flipped his state house seat from Red to Blue in a Trump +10 district by talking to every voter, regardless of party. As a rising star in the Democratic Party, Tom has been fighting hard in the state house to ensure all Montanans have access to affordable, quality healthcare. Tom is running for Congress in 2020 for Montana’s At Large congressional seat. To learn more click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/winter_em_donate?refcode=em_footer] .
Paid for by Winter for Montana
Winter for Montana
P.O. Box 8248
Missoula, MT 59807
United States

name: Josh Hicks
subject: John Prine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends --

We’ve experienced a lot of loss due to COVID-19 — and everyone’s trying to stay as safe and healthy as we can.

One of the tremendous losses we’ve suffered has been John Prine, a folk musician who traced his roots back to western Kentucky.

He wrote some of the most poignant, heartfelt, and touching songs this country has experienced.

If you’re like me, and you’re missing John, turn on a few of my favorite songs.

Whether you’re listening to "Paradise," about his parent’s homeplace in western Kentucky, or "Sam Stone" and his thoughts on the terrible human consequences of war, what you’re really hearing is someone with his finger on the pulse of rural, heartland America.

"Summer’s End" vividly tells of the opioid epidemic and the losses we’ve all suffered.

And "Dear Abby" is a poignant reminder of everyone’s troubles — how insignificant they can seem to others, although they’re so important to us.

I hope we all take a moment to reflect on the loss we suffered when John Prine left us.

But I know, from his song "When I Get To Heaven," that he’s enjoying that nine-mile cigarette along with some vodka and ginger ale.

- Josh

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_org_johnprine_all_ftr1]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_org_johnprine_all_ftr2]

subject: Time To Show Our Determination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17210034/186711953/-1907457918?refcode=04032020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDE1ZDMzNC1kZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIei3WGq4uOhNOfnHll_ujeln3_rH9RMlfnrKBPofxE=)

Dear Friend, Response to our recent issues survey far exceeded any others we've done. That tells me something - we're moving beyond the initial shock of the pandemic and starting to re-engage. And if you're like me, shock is transforming into determination. If we don't fight hard, one of our Republican opponents will simply waltz into this open seat. [I need your help to make sure that doesn't happen](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17210035/186711954/-1907457919?refcode=04212020_em_line1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDE1ZDMzNC1kZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIei3WGq4uOhNOfnHll_ujeln3_rH9RMlfnrKBPofxE=). | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17210036/186711955/1282705599?refcode=04212020_em_button1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDE1ZDMzNC1kZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIei3WGq4uOhNOfnHll_ujeln3_rH9RMlfnrKBPofxE=)
---
The COVID-19 pandemic is an event that requires clear-eyed leadership, sound decision making, decisive action, consistent communication, and a functioning government infrastructure to deliver help where it was needed the most. Results on all of the above have been mixed, at best, at every level. This is an event we should have been prepared for. This is an event that we must learn from, that __must__ transform us as a nation. Neither of my Republican opponents proposes anything but staying with the status quo that brought us to this point. [My platform](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17210037/186711956/1916827524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDE1ZDMzNC1kZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIei3WGq4uOhNOfnHll_ujeln3_rH9RMlfnrKBPofxE=&emci=f503b39f-d083-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=2d15d334-de83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10438639) to deliver quality, affordable health care to every American and to invest in our future remains unchanged. The only thing different is the enormous increase in urgency to get it done. But without your support, it won't happen. name: Brittni McGuire
subject: wow
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Friend,
Wow! Y’all have already covered $1,670 of the $3,500 needed for our ‘adopt a voter’ program! We are close but still need to raise another $1,830.
Will you help us close the gap right now by making a donation? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Increasing voter turnout and engagement is how Democrats will win in 2020. Please join the WVDP in our efforts to organize and mobilize. Every vote counts.
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Belinda Biafore < belinda@wvdemocrats.com [belinda@wvdemocrats.com] >
Date: Thu, Apr 16, 2020 at 10:30 AM
Subject: adopt a voter
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,
I’d like to tell you what we are focusing on this month, and ask for your help.
We are trying to raise $3,500 towards funding our ‘adopt a voter’ program. This program is designed to target new and unlikely voters at a personal level, increasing voter turnout and enthusiasm – and right now we need help paying for things like stamps and printing costs. Outreach at this capacity is expensive but necessary. Right now it is more important than ever to engage folks that might not otherwise vote.
We understand why some people prefer to give to individual campaigns – but this is an opportunity to capitalize on the resources the WVDP has to be more efficient and smarter. This is how we will beat Republicans in 2020.
Will you help us by making a donation right now - and help us fund this exciting program? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
November is coming quickly, and we have to come together and mobilize as Democrats. We’re all in this together!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

name: Mary Mancini
subject: wow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Peter,

Wow! Your investment has already covered $6,275 of the $10k we need to unlock our generous donor’s matching pledge for data visualization tools for our candidates! We are close, but still need to raise another $3,725.

Will you help us close the gap right now by making a donation? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

This digital support program offers invaluable district and presinct level insights to ALL of our candidates. With so much opportunity for Democrats this year, please help us give them the cutting-edge tools they need to win!

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mary Mancini < mary@tndp.org [mary@tndp.org] >
Date: Thu, Apr 16, 2020 at 10:37 AM
Subject: DIG2020 2.0
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
I’d like to tell you what we are focusing on this month, and ask for your help.
We are trying to raise $10,000 to help fund a new digital program for our candidates. The program will cost in excess of $100k, but an extremely generous donor has agreed to cover the rest if we can raise the first $10k. This program gives our candidates cutting edge data visualization tools, and allows us to provide important insights at the district and precinct levels. With social distancing being the new normal, we are staying ahead of the curve by continuing to offer state of the art digital services to all of our candidates.
We understand why some people prefer to give to individual campaigns – but this is an example of how we can come together as a state party to be more efficient and smarter. This is how we can beat Republicans in 2020.
Will you help us by making a donation right now - and help us fund this exciting program? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
November is coming quickly, and it is more important than ever to come together and mobilize as Democrats. We’re all in this together!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Elliot Gault
subject: FWD: NHGOP is still organizing, recruiting, and planning to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Hello Derek,
Wanted to make sure you saw the Chairman's email from last week.
We are working every day at the New Hampshire Republican Party to make sure we are ready to campaign and win in November. This last month has only increased the dire need for a Republican Legislature and Executive Council in Concord - we need a government that will work with Governor Chris Sununu and not fight him at every opportunity.
Since the Chairman's email last Thursday, our team has made 15,439 phone calls to voters, held 10 virtual events, and activated over 100 volunteers.
Democrat legislative leaders were in court yesterday suing the Governor to obstruct his ability to disperse Federal CARES Act funds.
The stakes couldn't be higher. We need the resources to be successful, and [your support during this time couldn't be more critical.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE2MjAmZD1hN2IwZjNk.BVCd_YLiYv2LERFDUg5u3VblTsvzAOpyUsS6ulFyP-g)
[Donate $10 to help us reach out to 500 voters digitally](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE2MzQmZD1wMXAwbTB1.7717KIDda_wCNgKwPafIi7kEF4pf9hwqqEPQB8NW1kI)
[Donate $20 to help us call 1000 voters](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE2NDImZD1tMWQ4aTZ5.GI8ESktbPQP2X8PArabBLUs5hap9pF9QCTX27bOxYBU)
[Donate $30 to do both!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE2NTQmZD1wMXExbTdn.KPwMGIyRg0japihLocq_-HGgU6Dh_J09Q2CfzfK0Ets)
[Your investment](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE2OTImZD11MXM3eTNt.tezSr86n9zDvSARCeQrQBvNM9DSDo_gmGP-Ar0xL52g) in the New Hampshire Republican Party is vital now more than ever.
Sincerely,
Elliot Gault
NHGOP Executive Director
|
---
Hello Derek,
I wanted to send you a note during these uncertain times to give you an update as to what the New Hampshire Republican Party is doing and how we are continuing our efforts to organize, recruit, and train Republicans across the State of New Hampshire to ensure a victorious November election is on the horizon.
Just this week I have been on Zoom video calls with our county and city chairs along with our Vice Chair Pamela Tucker and House Republican Leader Dick Hinch to examine the current state of candidate recruitment and bring focus to areas we need to recruit in before candidates file in 7 weeks.
The NHGOP & Trump Victory staff have been hard at work fielding questions from activists, organizing our latest online petition, and managing the transition to this new digitally organized world. Since the beginning of March our team has contacted over 90,000 voters by phone and held 50 activist trainings activating over 350 volunteers.
In short, the New Hampshire Republican Party is active and prepared to handle this current crisis and continue to hold the Democrats accountable.
One of the biggest changes we face is the different approach we have to take to getting Republicans out to vote in November. In light of this, we need to switch our focus and budget to support a robust mail and digital advertising program along with increased remote phone-banking to reach voters.
That's why I am reaching out and providing you with this update today. Now more than ever we need your support in order to have the resources needed for victory. Our competition isn't slowing down and we aren't either which is why we need your help to have the resources to properly fight back.
[Donate $10 to help us reach out to 500 voters digitally](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE2OTgmZD1uM2Y2YTJ0.WW_f5r6jTZmMmOU60PL6kGn9XPBfWqPCaf4qnT5w5i8)
[Donate $20 to help us call 1000 voters](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE3MDYmZD1sNWQ4bTJy.scgYmruXTbvfc5FFg7Orbl7GaWRXqPG3bgqBy0Yq0VY)
[Donate $30 to do both!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0Mjg5NTM4NTE1Mjc3MTg0JmM9bzNvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNjE3MzImZD1kN3k5bTNx.XNdEAKuIzTJ956L4offY49Nwl6ap0l5tMpe9LsiCYQs)
The NHGOP is ready and prepared to elect Republicans across the State of New Hampshire during these times. clean_body: | | Hello Derek, Wanted to make sure you saw the Chairman's email from last week. We are working every day at the New Hampshire Republican Party to make sure we are ready to campaign and win in November. This last month has only increased the dire need for a Republican Legislature and Executive Council in Concord - we need a government that will work with Governor Chris Sununu and not fight him at every opportunity. Since the Chairman's email last Thursday, our team has made 15,439 phone calls to voters, held 10 virtual events, and activated over 100 volunteers. Democrat legislative leaders were in court yesterday suing the Governor to obstruct his ability to disperse Federal CARES Act funds. The stakes couldn't be higher. We need the resources to be successful, and in the New Hampshire Republican Party is vital now more than ever. Sincerely, Elliot Gault NHGOP Executive Director | Hello Derek, I wanted to send you a note during these uncertain times to give you an update as to what the New Hampshire Republican Party is doing and how we are continuing our efforts to organize, recruit, and train Republicans across the State of New Hampshire to ensure a victorious November election is on the horizon. Just this week I have been on Zoom video calls with our county and city chairs along with our Vice Chair Pamela Tucker and House Republican Leader Dick Hinch to examine the current state of candidate recruitment and bring focus to areas we need to recruit in before candidates file in 7 weeks. The NHGOP & Trump Victory staff have been hard at work fielding questions from activists, organizing our latest online petition, and managing the transition to this new digitally organized world. Since the beginning of March our team has contacted over 90,000 voters by phone and held 50 activist trainings activating over 350 volunteers. In short, the New Hampshire Republican Party is active and prepared to handle this current crisis and continue to hold the Democrats accountable. One of the biggest changes we face is the different approach we have to take to getting Republicans out to vote in November. In light of this, we need to switch our focus and budget to support a robust mail and digital advertising program along with increased remote phone-banking to reach voters. That's why I am reaching out and providing you with this update today. Now more than ever we need your support in order to have the resources needed for victory. Our competition isn't slowing down and we aren't either which is why we need your help to have the resources to properly fight back. The NHGOP is ready and prepared to elect Republicans across the State of New Hampshire during these times. Regards, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chair Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street, Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States You are receiving this email as you have shown interest in Republican causes by signing up on our website or through a petition drive.

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Democrats vote to reverse funding transfers for COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0MzAwOTE4MjY2MDA4ODMxJmM9dDRtMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNzI0MzAmZD1uOWU1YTFw.T99vaMyiwLyV69IAUBOQILQiCvIpwoZWkScu-tNQ2U4)

---
---
| |
---
| |
---
“In this day and age of remote meetings, we need to make sure that every action we take is done in the most transparent way possible. This surprise motion that defunded our COVID-19 relief efforts was done without public knowledge and without consulting the Department of Health and Human Services to see what would be the impact of such a move. The public trust was betrayed today.” \- Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse
---
| |
---
| Friends, Yesterday, on a 7-3 party line vote, Democrats on the Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee, voted to reverse funding transfers that are being used to combat the COVID-19 pandemic. This was a surprise motion done without informing all of the committee members, and more importantly, the public. The NH Senate Republicans believe that we need more transparency from our government during this crisis, not less. Important decisions like this need to be made in full view of the people of New Hampshire, not behind closed doors. [Please help us keep the public informed by following us on Facebook for the latest updates.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA0MzAwOTE4MjY2MDA4ODMxJmM9dDRtMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDAwNzI0MzQmZD1wMmwwYzZ4.0tZOyeoSHLT6hSjxqI1wVaS7el6u9p2g8smPHea3HJU) Thank you. -The New Hampshire Senate Republicans
---

name: MJ Hegar Campaign HQ
subject: We're here because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Can you believe it's been one year since we launched this campaign together?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee2/393578847/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee1/393578847/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?refcode=email_20200421.1nd__1259__&amount=10")
---
**This Thursday marks one year since we launched our campaign, Peter, and WOW have we come a long way!**

Over the last year MJ has traveled **tens of thousands of miles** and spoken to **thousands of Texans** about the issues affecting them. _And_ MJ took first in the Texas Democratic primary, earning hundreds of thousands of votes.

**We've recently launched our virtual road trip** so that MJ can meet Texans where they are -- virtually. We're so glad to have had you with us on this journey, and we look forward to fighting alongside you during the months ahead!

You've been critical to this team's success so far, and we know that with your help, MJ is going to win the nomination and beat Sen. Cornyn in November. **If you can, be one of the 365 new donors* we need to hit our anniversary goal, and show MJ just how many of us have her back!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee0/393578847/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200421.1nd__1259__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee6/393578847/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200421.1nd__1259__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee5/393578847/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200421.1nd__1259__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee4/393578847/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?refcode=email_20200421.1nd__1259__")**
Y'all have given us hope for a future where we've got a fighter standing up for _all_ of us in the Senate.

\-- Team MJ

*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11ee1/393578847/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?refcode=email_20200421.1nd__1259__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11edb/393578847/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1259&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890328/7f51f7bc/4f0e3d85/4ef11eda/393578847/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:

---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d1oBc8dHQg6J2jkNi-MAiBfGeaqllyyOSp1KvWTMo99L73bElD9kJRPJVVhlCTtBXAFujDd0CPFHi30WDYn88ezAcZacQxkJmDSERSGqpXARJlMgFNGBKTKdydg21ODhGVm1EupYwL11MyG5adb5ubKjljqUkauw1QgZEyU2sngaPDLzYjcRMg==&c=0pYZ7NNW-cm7FgsF-w_1leA8c59luMO5GMr7lyAPXnC474ORnJhoFA==&ch=H4RwTnsvsrLtm_gBzzOUyQ1qfuQjUXy3wSiMm6jynp3juylQoDNz1g==)

| Peter,
"You absolutely love to see it." This is what AOC said about the collapse in oil prices that has the potential to decimate the Texas and U.S. economies, costing countless jobs. We should be focused on stabilizing American energy and American jobs, not cheering for their destruction!
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW TO TAKE BACK TEXAS FROM THE DESPICABLE DEMS >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d1oBc8dHQg6J2jkNi-MAiBfGeaqllyyOSp1KvWTMo99L73bElD9kJRPJVVhlCTtBXAFujDd0CPFHi30WDYn88ezAcZacQxkJmDSERSGqpXARJlMgFNGBKTKdydg21ODhGVm1EupYwL11MyG5adb5ubKjljqUkauw1QgZEyU2sngaPDLzYjcRMg==&c=0pYZ7NNW-cm7FgsF-w_1leA8c59luMO5GMr7lyAPXnC474ORnJhoFA==&ch=H4RwTnsvsrLtm_gBzzOUyQ1qfuQjUXy3wSiMm6jynp3juylQoDNz1g==)

| |
---
| Congressional Democrats appear dead set on destroying the Texas and American economies. [Help me stop them!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d1oBc8dHQg6J2jkNi-MAiBfGeaqllyyOSp1KvWTMo99L73bElD9kJRPJVVhlCTtBXAFujDd0CPFHi30WDYn88ezAcZacQxkJmDSERSGqpXARJlMgFNGBKTKdydg21ODhGVm1EupYwL11MyG5adb5ubKjljqUkauw1QgZEyU2sngaPDLzYjcRMg==&c=0pYZ7NNW-cm7FgsF-w_1leA8c59luMO5GMr7lyAPXnC474ORnJhoFA==&ch=H4RwTnsvsrLtm_gBzzOUyQ1qfuQjUXy3wSiMm6jynp3juylQoDNz1g==)
They don't understand how energy or the economy work, or how to help businesses and employees. They cheer oil's collapse in the hopes that it will further their misguided socialist and "Green New Deal" agenda of overregulation.
The choice in this race is clear. The Democrat party is scared of our campaign, that's why they've mobilized against me, buying over $1 million in ads to attack us. [I need your help TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d1oBc8dHQg6J2jkNi-MAiBfGeaqllyyOSp1KvWTMo99L73bElD9kJRPJVVhlCTtBXAFujDd0CPFHi30WDYn88ezAcZacQxkJmDSERSGqpXARJlMgFNGBKTKdydg21ODhGVm1EupYwL11MyG5adb5ubKjljqUkauw1QgZEyU2sngaPDLzYjcRMg==&c=0pYZ7NNW-cm7FgsF-w_1leA8c59luMO5GMr7lyAPXnC474ORnJhoFA==&ch=H4RwTnsvsrLtm_gBzzOUyQ1qfuQjUXy3wSiMm6jynp3juylQoDNz1g==).
Thank you and God Bless!

body:
| | Friend: Tomorrow morning, I'm hopping on a video call with Reverend Warnock to review responses to the strategy survey we sent around yesterday - but it looks like we're still missing yours.
---
We specifically reached out to _you_ because you've been identified as a top supporter who has _critical_ insights into helping us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate.
That's why we're asking only you and a handful of other top supporters to complete our official campaign strategy survey. **But we need to hear from you by midnight tonight - so please, friend, will you take just one moment to share your input?**
Here's the best link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-su-nd")**
Thanks so much - I'm looking forward to sharing your response with Reverend Warnock.
Jerid Kurtz
Campaign Manager
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Warnock
Date: Mon, April 20, 2020
Subject: you've been selected, friend
| | | | |
---
We just pulled a list of our top supporters - the people most dedicated to flipping Georgia blue and taking back the Senate - and your name is on that list, friends.
Our Republican opponent - unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler - has spent her entire career serving corporations and special interests instead of working people. You've been _specifically_ chosen because you have valuable insights that we believe can help defeat her in November. _**[_So please, friends, will you help us develop a winning strategy by taking our short campaign strategy survey now?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-su-nd")**_

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats CAN take back the Senate - but only if we win in Georgia. That's why it's so important that we hear directly from supporters like you.
While Kelly Loeffler (R) is already spending millions of her own fortune to try and buy this seat, Reverend Warnock (D) is running a grassroots campaign that puts your interests, your priorities and your concerns front and center.

We're building a coalition of working people from all over Georgia to fight for a brighter, fairer future for ALL, not just the lucky few. But we won't win without your input, friends.
**So please, before this survey expires at midnight tonight: **_**[Complete our short campaign strategy survey now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-su-nd")**_

Team Warnock

name: John Cornyn
subject: Biden’s vision for Texas
body:
Friend, It's been a few days since I checked in with you about this but I didn't want you to forget, I know Joe won't. It's a very important reminder.
JOE BIDEN, the Democrats presumptive nominee for the White House has revealed his plan for Texas.
A DEEP BLUE TAKEOVER OF OUR STATE.
Look what Joe Biden himself had to say: **"I think you're going to turn Texas Blue."**
-Joe Biden September 14, 2019 in Dallas, Texas [ **STOP JOE BIDEN** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdJpENv-o7foQ82BexOzoKss1wa14DzMRRXdV3XKwESTqX48xcIhSPi44S4ZrmZUv09kVXQUKTxloUi7n0pIHDs-awV8gZlb8pvnl_upIFQA7DpNC6XExbUxZemEgaSL4KjUgb8KD9ZzDPn238vPfOw6JsKlPtqagaonXSDFFNqCX9swJgIfkr5fKBmboqaQajsE6uWdeJyMCOEcbwAWqnJ7A91Xg5w0h8QpSgrCXGJpD7YutPdq2CA9nIl2n72C1odTAWu2Z3QIySGts_twkLzzej7p1CZ2YqI5jVM-FmrmO&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) [ **STOP THE RADICAL LEFT** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdJpENv-o7foQ82BexOzoKss1wa14DzMRRXdV3XKwESTqX48xcIhSPi44S4ZrmZUv09kVXQUKTxloUi7n0pIHDs-awV8gZlb8pvnl_upIFQA7DpNC6XExbUxZemEgaSL4KjUgb8KD9ZzDPn238vPfOw6JsKlPtqagaonXSDFFNqCX9swJgIfkr5fKBmboqaQajsE6uWdeJyMCOEcbwAWqnJ7A91Xg5w0h8QpSgrCXGJpD7YutPdq2CA9nIl2n72C1odTAWu2Z3QIySGts_twkLzzej7p1CZ2YqFflcw__LF9I&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) [ **KEEP TEXAS RED** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdJpENv-o7foQ82BexOzoKss1wa14DzMRRXdV3XKwESTqX48xcIhSPi44S4ZrmZUv09kVXQUKTxloUi7n0pIHDs-awV8gZlb8pvnl_upIFQA7DpNC6XExbUxZemEgaSL4KjUgb8KD9ZzDPn238vPfOw6JsKlPtqagaonXSDFFNqCX9swJgIfkr5fKBmboqaQajsE6uWdeJyMCOEcbwAWqnJ7A91Xg5w0h8QpSgrCXGJpD7YutPdq2CA9nIl2n72C1odTAWu2Z3QIySGts_twkLzzej7p1CZ2YqB9o9FCOq9Qw&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) Friend, the Far-Left is making Texas their number one target this election.
They're going to parade their pundits through every mainstream media outlet with statements like Biden's. They really think they have a shot at flipping our state BLUE.
And if we're not careful, they are going to succeed. Friend - WE NEED TO STOP THEM!
**[Can I count on you to keep Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer from taking over Texas and undoing our state's long tradition of conservativism?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdJpENv-o7foQ82BexOzoKss1wa14DzMRRXdV3XKwESTqX48xcIhSPi44S4ZrmZUv09kVXQUKTxloUi7n0pIHDs-awV8gZlb8pvnl_upIFQA7DpNC6XExbUxZemEgaSL4KjUgb8KD9ZzDPn238vPfOw6JsKlPtqagaonXSDFFNqCX9swJgIfkr5fKBmboqaQajsE6uWdeJyMCOEcbwAWqnJ7A91Xg5w0h8QpSgrCXGJpD7YutPdq2CA9nIl2n72C1odTAWu2Z3QIySGts_twkLzzej7p1CZ2YqMcoguB9wHUP&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==)**
John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdEiXjf0XDEoLRU0NifZoK2fIuvdbvWCmNcy_azGa0AJPPdVPUiX2OrUt5wIuuJBJCxgGLKYOMCvKM3E2GJ2HAyG-qMb7WG7sC96qzDiAw_HmnTZ6I5B3YFg=&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdJpENv-o7foQ8f1qfvC9IGbz0KUrwx_F6A68JsVsw1FHKaVzKthdLBkitGyQUfM_M70h8CmuhH6m06C_Q7Uzz5T2rgDIv81VBcPowsvMAZA7&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdEiXjf0XDEoL9nkz4IQScmic7aA80W7BFSx609ySAhDbzTp8h6b1HyNDr6YoQSUp1aUCMC4mlEY1aFkGLTdLqxm8-TIEcOPWRo6guxtQUg_b1mj4tpMg3HdQfPK9aYpxSg==&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AqIqbtEmfv0Rkwi_p4tXLYwSRzORPXW7y9du9BSPWfWNkixKy5yvdDZ5nlbiHLbqd0ri1gpqKqptR7qSsymMazEFnDgbw-sf5Vjo5h0JTO32hnDN_qNl_s1ZNH2b1SW8iaYJIp_LTRWE0eaBIFEF2gm6mgOV9XZ7FOsizioLPgSTrf4pSbAhaTtOWP-XSyxXlUnR_cbPX909K3Q6RG7-dfPKyX7dD6pkmMIHujiT_u7XDHziE_t4rRz6ge4wqPbLLLCzYOPVRoaiS_A0Q8xWB7S9wGRwocsiCdMz7vXN_FJpWJcam9aRRw==&c=yOUMHTqt69mIl7IOz-LbxCrjsFww8zFZK0pYuzlDBID5PdZeADAgqw==&ch=Y29qqDlHU09up5GK2YJZzgdKV8zGk_7ykRrkcYxhtbVucAFToYGrbg==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

clean_body: You’ve heard us say it a million times. We don’t take corporate PAC money or self-fund our campaign with millions of dollars. | | | Friend, ** You’ve heard us say it a million times. We don’t take corporate PAC money or self-fund our campaign with millions of dollars. We keep saying it because we believe that the way you fund a campaign says a lot about the type of race you’re running. Since the start of April, our average donation online has been $72.70. Our small-dollar online fundraising is such a crucial part of our success. It’s what allows us to run a grassroots campaign without having to rely on special interests or corporations. Donations like these give us the resources we need to get our message out all across the district. We are now 9 weeks away from Election Day. We’ve worked so hard these last 9 months and we can’t afford to let up now. This is crunch time. We need your support now more than ever. This is the time in the campaign when voters really start tuning in, and we need to make sure they hear our message. ** We’re so proud of the campaign we’ve run so far. We’ve got endorsements from leading national progressive figures like Elizabeth Warren, and over 40 local elected officials and community leaders. We have hundreds of volunteers who are making thousands of calls and sending thousands of texts every single day. We’re going to win this. Let’s get it done. Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . name: Kathy Manning
subject: What are you doing to lift your spirits?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
This is what I've been doing at home:
|
---

| | Right now, we all could use more light-hearted moments to get us through this challenging time. Recently, I caught up with friends on a video chat and shared a prayer for our frontline workers, first responders, and teachers. I've also been spending some of our time at home baking and even attended a virtual wedding and a virtual baby naming! Rather than lament the fact that we can't be together for these important life cycle events, we have learned to celebrate the fact that so many of us were able to join in on these wonderful family celebrations from across the country. |
---
---
Whether it's reconnecting with loved ones who you haven't been able to see, giving back to your community, or taking up new hobbies, we should all do small things to lift our spirits.
**What have you been doing at home to keep spirits up? Reply to this email and let me know!**
I look forward to reading your responses,
Kathy

---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Protecting small businesses during COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iKvpq2vpg5-ed3G58i9Vwx7Oml7egzOkV2s2yWLO0N4=/esAB6ikzlJcuB0GbDOLL2LO5UM7U19fPHLXsEgAoXb0=)
---
| Folks, I know this public health emergency has been hard on many of us. Many are without jobs, risking their lives as essential workers, or worrying about an unstable economy. Today, I want to discuss small businesses, which have been hit with brutal force by COVID-19. **I 'm proud to introduce two new bills in the House to help speed the delivery of emergency funds to small businesses, their employees, and the self-employed.** I have supported efforts to bring relief to small businesses in the form of grants, loans, and debt relief, and I'm proud to say that Congress has passed many of these necessary measures. But unfortunately, as of now, there are many barriers to receiving this existing support. Small business owners, especially those in underserved communities, continue to face bureaucratic obstacles when it comes to receiving small business aid. We need to do everything we can to ease these burdens. That's why I introduced legislation to speed up the delivery of emergency funds. Small businesses can only survive for so long without this aid. My legislation will also expand eligibility for the Paycheck Protection Program so certain businesses are not shut out from this essential program by outdated regulations. And finally, it will expand the scope of the Paycheck Protection Program to allow small minority-owned banks, rural banks, and credit unions to provide these loans. **I am working hard to secure the full support that small businesses, small business owners, and their employees need to make it through this pandemic.** Small businesses are a vital part of our economy, and I hope that they will soon be able to flourish again. In service, \-- Congressman Al Green
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/iKvpq2vpg5-ed3G58i9Vwx7Oml7egzOkV2s2yWLO0N4=/0HE-YGAJBIj6eUgJWN8FVE5U1zR2pkk-i16VyKuxLyA=) here.

name: Corky Messner
subject: China's lies caused American suffering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
China lied to the international community, and it needs to be a wake-up call. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/05e8b483a267cc1bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Recent news has proved one thing clear: The Chinese Communist Party lied to the international community about the severity of COVID-19 and their domestic infection rate.

There can be no arguing that the Chinese government’s deception and lies have led us to a worldwide pandemic that has cost lives and wreaked havoc on our economy and our way of life. **Americans have suffered due to the Chinese Communist Party’s censorship and LIES about the COVID-19 virus!** In the U.S. Senate, I will stand up to the Chinese government, and make them pay for their transgressions. **[Will you contribute $5, $25, $100, $250, $500 or more today to help me get there?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/0ac77714e980b7c0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/91411d6cae3c5ffbc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Hold China Accountable – Donate Today! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/5b736b0d06771be7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, you can be sure I fully support a range of sanctions against the Chinese Communist regime for misleading the world and causing so much misery and despair, starting with forcing China to cover the trillions of dollars spent on stimulus packages for Americans.

We should also use the pandemic as a wakeup call. During her time in the U.S. Senate, Jeanne Shaheen has done little to safeguard our nation and preserve our manufacturing might and leadership.

**We need to focus on President Trump’s America First agenda: getting back to making things, building things, and creating jobs... putting America FIRST!**

One thing is clear: We can’t do it with Jeanne Shaheen representing New Hampshire. She had her chance, and we ended up in a compromised position. **[Contribute right now to help me put America FIRST and get our economy back on track!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/89c6dcf8bb9fb85bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

The path forward is clear. We need to consider reducing the federal corporate income tax to encourage companies to keep their facilities on American soil, allowing accelerated depreciation schedules for plant and equipment expensing, and offering companies willing to expand their facilities in the U.S. and hire American employees an immediate tax deduction for capital investments.

[**Please, consider contributing right now to help me hold China accountable, and restore faith in the American economy for decades to come!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/292e225eafc5477ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Thanks for your support,
Corky [ Hold China Accountable – Donate Today! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/5fe9db21b75a67f9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/9ee4e7ec0b01bc12c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0ff2b6b33845bb20/2f1dc86b5d4402a9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How the Media Completely Blew the Trump Ventilator Story
body:
"After nearly four years of unrelieved Trump hysteria in the media, it’s hard to rank the worst journalistic outrages.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c18c87a82a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How the Media Completely Blew the Trump Ventilator Story**

“After nearly four years of unrelieved Trump hysteria in the media, it’s hard to rank the worst journalistic outrages,” Rich Lowry writes for the _National Review_. But how the press misreported the story of America’s ventilator stockpile “belongs high on the list.”

Last year, America produced a total of 30,000 ventilators. This year, the country will produce somewhere around 200,000—and the machines are already coming in.

“By any measure, that’s a success, certainly compared with where we thought we’d be less than a month ago. If the media weren’t so devoted to gotcha idiocy, more people might know about it.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b705b8a30a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The U.S. Small Business Administration has “processed more than 14 years’ worth of loans in less than 14 days . . . A month ago, it would have been unfathomable to imagine that a relatively small federal agency like SBA could erect a loan program” of that scale in just one week, Small Business Administrator Jovita Carranza writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d74a10122&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Facing a once-in-a-century pandemic, a crisis that some have likened to a world war, the U.S. is fortunate to have President Trump in charge. I have witnessed him make the tough decisions necessary at every turn to keep America safe. Seven of these decisions stand out,” National Security Adviser Robert O’Brien writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=880f47db94&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

| “Now more than ever before, we must take action to address the mental health consequences this pandemic has brought. Under the president's direction, we are harnessing a whole-of-government approach to remove the barriers to addressing mental health and preventing suicide for Americans,” Second Lady Karen Pence, Dr. Barbara Van Dahlen, and Dr. Elizabeth Van Winkle write for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=befa37e62a&e=3ee4985eea).

body:
[1]Powered By People

This is
beautiful.

Together, we made 2,500 calls on Saturday to help food banks feed the
hungry. We signed up hundreds of volunteers. People across the country are
helping out.

But we’re hoping to do a lot more. 22 million Americans have now filed for
unemployment in the last four weeks. It’s deeply alarming, but it’s
inspiring to see so many people joining in to help feed those in need.

We’re aiming to make 3,000 phone calls today to help food banks get the
volunteer-power they need. But we can’t meet our goal without enough
people joining a virtual phone bank with Beto – can you make it?

subject: Did you RSVP yet for the call with Cory tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
You've been invited to a conference call with Cory Booker. Hey there, just wanted to make sure you saw this. Cory is leading a call **tomorrow** at **5 p.m. EDT** to discuss the COVID-19 public health crisis -- and you're invited to join. **[Please RSVP here if you'd be available to participate. Cory will be answering questions on the call as well.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/rsvp-for-a-call-with-cory?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+Please+RSVP+here+if+yoursquod+be+availab&utm_campaign=em200421&source=em200421")** Cory's been very busy these past few days working on the next federal relief package in the Senate and he'll have important updates to share on his efforts during tomorrow's call. Hope you can join us,
Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Hey there, Senator Booker is hosting an important call this **Wednesday, April 22nd** at **5 p.m. EDT** to discuss the federal response to COVID-19, talk about our path forward, and answer your questions. **[To dial into the call or join by video conference, you must RSVP in advance. Please RSVP here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/rsvp-for-a-call-with-cory?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+To+dial+into+the+call+or+join+by+video+c&utm_campaign=em200421&source=em200421")** Cory will be talking about the efforts he's helping to lead in the Senate, such as improving benefits and safety for essential employees, expanding unemployment insurance, fighting to get more protective equipment for health care workers, increasing funding for hospitals, and more. **[RSVP here to join the call on Wednesday. Space is limited so secure your spot on the call today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/rsvp-for-a-call-with-cory?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+RSVP+here+to+join+the+call+on+Wednesday+&utm_campaign=em200421&source=em200421")** We hope you can join Cory on Wednesday. Hope you can join us, Booker HQ \---FORWARDED MESSAGE--- Hey there, Senator Booker is hosting an important call this Wednesday, April 22nd at 5 p.m. EDT to discuss the federal response to COVID-19, talk about our path forward, and answer your questions. "" Cory will be talking about the efforts he's helping to lead in the Senate, such as improving benefits and safety for essential employees, expanding unemployment insurance, fighting to get more protective equipment for health care workers, increasing funding for hospitals, and more. "" We hope you can join Cory on Wednesday. Talk soon, Team Booker | "" PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE ""

name: Karen Giorno
subject: You won't believe what happened over the weekend . . .
body:
On Sunday morning, my phone BLEW UP! Folks from the highest levels of politics were reaching out to show their support for Laura Loomer for Congress and after about the 12th call, I checked my twitter feed and realized where this was coming from.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372790-876558-4965825-b4f73c7e91-f261ad6cfe)
Patriot,

After nine months of deliberate effort and planning, on Sunday morning, my phone BLEW UP!

Colleagues from the highest levels of politics were reaching out to declare their support for Laura Loomer for Congress and in that moment I knew our strategic efforts to build Laura’s credibility as a winning candidate must have caught the eye of our President when . . .

**. . . President Trump tweeted his support for Laura Loomer’s campaign!**
Here’s the tweet originally posted by our friend and Navy Seal Carl Higbie:

I can’t tell you how grateful I am to President Trump for acknowledging Laura’s race, and more importantly, Americans around the nation and especially Floridians stepped up to support Laura's race and we raised $37,000 in 72 hours!

That’s huge but we’re competing against the cash horde that the Democrat incumbent is sitting on.

“Lazy” Lois Frankel, who is the Democrat member of Congress tasked with mentoring “The Squad” and acting as Nancy Pelosi’s lieutenant is sitting on $1.2 million in donations from special interests and liberal donors -- including failed presidential billionaire Michael Bloomberg.

**We have to catch up with her and fast.[Will you donate now to help us bridge the gap?](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372790-876558-4965824-4ba66f8249-f261ad6cfe)**

In my 30 years working with candidates -- with only one exception -- I’ve never seen a non-politician such as Laura gain so much support so fast!

That one exception?

Donald J. Trump whom I worked directly with in 2016 as a senior advisor.

**Just like they did with President Trump, when Laura announced, the left-wing media laughed!**

One reporter doubted “if she would ever raise a dime” while others labeled Laura – who is a Jewish American -- a "white supremacist" in their attempt to falsely define her at every turn.

Despite the attacks from the left, we’ve outraised a four-term Democrat Congresswoman THREE times in a row – and we’ve done it with your help!

It’s us against them and we need to take this all the way to November and get Laura into Congress!

[If you haven’t already done so, please donate what you can right now.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372790-876558-4965824-4ba66f8249-f261ad6cfe)

Not only will we unseat one of the laziest members of Congress, but we’ll FORCE Democrats to divert millions of dollars from races around the nation to stop Laura.

I believe the President will get elected with your help however, we MUST flip the House red to give President Trump an even more productive four years -- by getting rid of obstructionist Democrats.

That’s huge but we’re competing against the cash horde that the Democrat incumbent is sitting on. “Lazy” Lois Frankel, who is the Democrat member of Congress tasked with mentoring “The Squad” and acting as Nancy Pelosi’s lieutenant is sitting on $1.2 million in donations from special interests and liberal donors -- including failed presidential billionaire Michael Bloomberg. We have to catch up with her and fast. In my 30 years working with candidates -- with only one exception -- I’ve never seen a non-politician such as Laura gain so much support so fast! That one exception? Donald J. Trump whom I worked directly with in 2016 as a senior advisor. Just like they did with President Trump, when Laura announced, the left-wing media laughed! One reporter doubted “if she would ever raise a dime” while others labeled Laura – who is a Jewish American -- a "white supremacist" in their attempt to falsely define her at every turn. name: Warner Survey Team
subject: benefits for gig workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It took the coronavirus pandemic for Congress to finally realize that there are gaps in our social safety net, particularly when it comes to unemployment insurance.
|
---
| | Derek --

It took the coronavirus pandemic for Congress to finally realize that there are gaps in our social safety net, particularly when it comes to unemployment insurance.

**Chief among those at risk of falling through the cracks are gig economy and contingent workers.** Millions of Americans who work as rideshare workers, handymen, hairdressers, truck drivers, and other self-employed, contract, and gig workers don't always have access to traditional benefits. And most service sector, part-time, and low-wage workers in America don't have access to healthcare, paid leave, or a telework option through their employer.

For years, Mark has said that we need to do more to protect American workers, that our system was increasingly leaving millions of workers behind. Mark was outspoken about the need to expand benefits for workers before this pandemic, and he continues to advocate for aid for gig economy and contingent workers when negotiating coronavirus relief packages.

**In the latest stimulus package, Congress temporarily expanded paid leave to _some_ workers,** finally recognizing the public health challenges facing workers who lack these benefits. Unfortunately, millions more still lack paid sick leave, and the coronavirus relief programs are temporary, which means that all gig workers will be at risk once this aid runs out.

**Mark is pushing innovative portable benefits legislation that will help patch these holes in our social safety net that prevent millions of workers from accessing unemployment insurance, healthcare, sick leave, and other basic benefits. But we want to know where you stand:**
| **Do you support more portable benefits for
American workers?** | **[YES](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f1/53d9897e/54ca418a/1c88645d/1012462519/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-portable?refcode=20200420_s_1_fl__548__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")** | **[NO](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f1/53d9897e/54ca418a/1c88645c/1012462519/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/content/warner-portableno/")**
---|---

**As our country weathers the coronavirus crisis, the need to protect gig economy workers has never been more apparent -- or urgent.** But the need to protect these workers isn't going to go away as the pandemic recedes.

Thank you for your support,

Team Warner

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f1/53d9897e/54ca418a/1c88645b/1012462519/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Rita Hart for Congress
subject: I’m teaming up with my fellow Iowa Democrats...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/pSpT_-0uU33w9efFhGe5hQVn6W7DoRtcd6BA-K9WcPs=)._
* * *
I want to make sure you saw yesterday's email because it's an important one, Peter. In response to a massive ad buy from the largest Republican Super PAC in the country, I'm teaming up with my fellow Iowa Democrats to raise as much money as we can from our combined network of small-dollar donors. **[We can't let them mislead voters about our records. Iowa Democrats stick together because we all value education, health care and access to opportunity for all. Now, you have the chance to give to all four races at once. Will you donate any amount today for us to split evenly between our campaigns? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/u84sCaNZdraed8q8W-7zZBud552Hp2cTNrXJHFPbLUc=?refcode=200421-email)** Thanks for being on our team. \-- Rita **\----- Forwarded Message -----** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/u84sCaNZdraed8q8W-7zZBud552Hp2cTNrXJHFPbLUc=?refcode=200421-email) **URGENT NEWS:** The largest Washington Republican Super PAC plans to spend $4 MILLION in Iowa.
_[We need your help to fight back for a united, blue Iowa](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/-1J-WIOjuyDeqTEEg8pVSzWabiXBcNS9zBd2wGwADHM=?refcode=200421-email)._ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/u84sCaNZdraed8q8W-7zZBud552Hp2cTNrXJHFPbLUc=?refcode=200421-email) | ****[Donate to all 4 races](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/u84sCaNZdraed8q8W-7zZBud552Hp2cTNrXJHFPbLUc=?refcode=200421-email)****
---
We're teaming up with Cindy Axne, Abby Finkenauer and J.D. Scholten for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the resources we need to fight against this sea of outside money. Iowa Democrats stick together, and we need our small-dollar donor base to step up now more than ever.
**[It's more than just our race on the line -- the fight for affordable health care, protecting Social Security and fighting for an economy that works for everyone could hinge on Iowa. Donate $40 today to send $10 to each of our campaigns!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hn4uBWM2nbPbIN1tZ_G4mplVrcZG-S_JGsGPJENzJSA=/u84sCaNZdraed8q8W-7zZBud552Hp2cTNrXJHFPbLUc=?refcode=200421-email&amount=40)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: _

Iowa Democrats are in this together because we know the value of listening, of working hard for what's right and delivering results for the American people. Dark money groups are spending millions to stop us, which we take as a sign that what we're doing is working.

subject: Sign Melania Trump’s birthday card today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
First Lady Melania Trump's birthday is coming up and as a surprise, my team and I are sending her a card to wish her a happy birthday. Will you sign her birthday card today?
Friend,
First Lady Melania Trump's birthday is coming up and as a surprise, my team and I are sending her a card to wish her a happy birthday. body:
Today we heard some news that makes all of our hard work worth it. It gives us so much energy to know that our movement is catching on fire.
#
We never said this fight would be easy.
It’s an up-hill battle going against Mitch McConnell and his billionaire friends.
**But today we heard some news that makes _all of our hard work worth it._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17216691/186843959/1360887821?refcode=em20200421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQxYjRjOS0xMzg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ov15AeWfmGRkfQhmgbi4CS5ZoTCfDc2WJl6m0Xba6dA=)
It gives us so much energy to see that our movement is catching on fire.
**[People are joining our fight every day to defeat Mitch McConnell and flip the Senate. Will you chip in $5 to grow our momentum and seize this historic chance?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17216705/186843973/1360887821?refcode=em20200421&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQxYjRjOS0xMzg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ov15AeWfmGRkfQhmgbi4CS5ZoTCfDc2WJl6m0Xba6dA=)**

It’s easy to get caught up in the vacuum of the news and feel hopeless.
**But that’s exactly what Mitch wants us to feel — hopeless.**
He wants us to doubt our power. He wants us to feel we have no chance. And he wants us to think this is all we deserve. That’s been his strategy for years and it’s kept him in office this long.
_This year, we’re rising up to say no. No more Mitch and no more politics that doesn’t work for us. _
Especially now, in the face of the greatest nationwide crisis our country has faced in modern history, we must remember the power we have to change things.
Charles is our strongest chance at real change this election. He’s proud to endorse people-focused policies and has demonstrated the courage to stand up to the corporate forces that have dominated our politics for too long.
**[A record number of people agree with Charles’ message and agree he’s the one to lead a new chapter in our politics.
