name: Zachary Weidlich, Campaign Manager
subject: China’s deadly lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
We need to get to the bottom of what happened. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/7fcc5622de07fc51/58056b0bf64120f3c3d6b838967d376c/32613) | |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Have you been following the latest news on the coronavirus?

**Top U.S. intelligence and national security officials are now looking into the possibility that a Wuhan bioresearch lab is the source of this outbreak**... not a “wet market” as has been claimed and widely reported by the media.

We don’t know the answer to this question yet, but it certainly merits investigation.

We DO know that the Chinese Communist Party has attempted to cover up the truth about this outbreak from Day One. They lied about human-to-human transmission, lied about the extent of the outbreak, and suppressed whistleblowers who attempted to alert the world.

What else are they lying about?

_You know we cannot trust the Chinese Communist Party!_

**[You can read more about this investigation here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/7fcc5622de07fc51/7206977f8d7834eec3d6b838967d376c/32613)**.

Whatever the truth is, we need to get to the bottom of it and make sure this never happens again. Jerry is also strongly supporting efforts by the Trump administration and Congress to hold China accountable for their suppression of medical experts and journalists.

**When China should have been raising a red flag to the world community, they were instead firing up their propaganda machine!**

Tens of thousands of lives likely could have been saved, along with tens of millions of lost jobs here in America and trillions of dollars.

Jerry will fight to hold China accountable. He’s also calling on American companies to bring back medical manufacturing to end our dependence on China.

Help us share this important message. Right now, our entire campaign is happening online.

Please forward this message to at least five family members or friends to let them know where Jerry stands and urge them to vote in the July 14th primary runoff.

Sincerely,

Zachary Weidlich
Campaign Manager, Jerry Carl for Congress
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/7fcc5622de07fc51/03cd7994c12bfbc2c3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/7fcc5622de07fc51/3cc9e88d5d7bc3e9c3d6b838967d376c/32613)

clean_body: We need to get to the bottom of what happened. Read more >> | | Fellow Conservative, Have you been following the latest news on the coronavirus? Top U.S. intelligence and national security officials are now looking into the possibility that a Wuhan bioresearch lab is the source of this outbreak... not a “wet market” as has been claimed and widely reported by the media. We don’t know the answer to this question yet, but it certainly merits investigation. We DO know that the Chinese Communist Party has attempted to cover up the truth about this outbreak from Day One. They lied about human-to-human transmission, lied about the extent of the outbreak, and suppressed whistleblowers who attempted to alert the world. What else are they lying about? You know we cannot trust the Chinese Communist Party! . Whatever the truth is, we need to get to the bottom of it and make sure this never happens again. Jerry is also strongly supporting efforts by the Trump administration and Congress to hold China accountable for their suppression of medical experts and journalists. When China should have been raising a red flag to the world community, they were instead firing up their propaganda machine! Tens of thousands of lives likely could have been saved, along with tens of millions of lost jobs here in America and trillions of dollars. Jerry will fight to hold China accountable. He’s also calling on American companies to bring back medical manufacturing to end our dependence on China. Help us share this important message. Right now, our entire campaign is happening online. Please forward this message to at least five family members or friends to let them know where Jerry stands and urge them to vote in the July 14th primary runoff. Sincerely, Zachary Weidlich Campaign Manager, Jerry Carl for Congress | | ---|--- To ensure you receive our emails, please add votecarl@jerrycarlupdates.com to your safe senders list or address book! id:2020-04-17-16:45:46:110t Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress

body:
| | | | I hope Senator DeMint’s endorsement of my candidacy today will encourage more of our Lowcountry neighbors to do our part in delivering a Republican majority in the House this year.
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg.) in your browser.

For decades, he has been _one of the nation 's leading conservative voices_. And, today, **Senator DeMint is the most prominent current or former elected official to weigh in on our top-ranked congressional district.**

clean_body: | | | | I hope Senator DeMint’s endorsement of my candidacy today will encourage more of our Lowcountry neighbors to do our part in delivering a Republican majority in the House this year. Email not displaying correctly? == in your browser. Dear Lowcountry Neighbors, To say I am over the moon about the news I am sharing today is an understatement. JIM DEMINT HAS ENDORSED OUR CAMPAIGN! For decades, I have admired Senator Jim DeMint's conservative conscience, his legacy of principled leadership, and his unwavering commitment to do what it is right even when it is not popular in Washington. For decades, he has been one of the nation 's leading conservative voices. And, today, Senator DeMint is the most prominent current or former elected official to weigh in on our top-ranked congressional district. The endorsement of our state's former Senator adds incredible momentum to our campaign! We continue to strongly position ourselves to not only win the June 9 th Republican Primary but also to win back this seat in the fall for conservatives, families, and sensible solutions. My conservative credentials and my ability to win this seat back was a focus of Senator DeMint's endorsement. He stressed that I am " the conservative candidate who can beat Joe Cunningham this fall." I know that one of Senator DeMint’s most respected characteristics is his ability to assess situations before making a decision. That is why I am so incredibly humbled and honored that, after assessing the candidates, he has endorsed me! You see, there is no denying that Jim DeMint is one of the leading forces in delivering the Republican majority we currently have in the Senate. I hope Senator DeMint’s endorsement of my candidacy today will encourage more of our Lowcountry neighbors to do our part in delivering a Republican majority in the House this year. To that end, I am hopeful you will consider supporting our campaign with whatever amount you are able today. Thank you in advance for your continued support! Let’s keep the momentum going and win the Republican Primary on June 9th! On to Victory, | Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " ---|--- | | Kathy Landing for Congress PO Box 31338 Charleston, SC 29417 | =

subject: A year already???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Y'all, how is that even possible?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032a/7f51f7bc/4f00f866/4ef10165/656244432/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Wow Peter, we've been building this campaign together for a **year** already? I've loved traveling the state, meeting Texans, and hearing about the issues that matter most to y'all, and the time has really flown by! **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032a/7f51f7bc/4f00f866/4ef10164/656244432/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?refcode=email_20200421.2nd__1264__&amount=10")** Now, though, we're facing an unprecedented challenge -- for this campaign and for the country. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: The digital learning gap is a chasm now. We need to fight for our students' futures
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/nyAM36fsS0lQS90jwG7GWLhR1BvNBUUS7Vi4XzGZDzE=)

Peter,

About a month ago, New York City's classrooms moved online. It's been a difficult transition for students, parents, and teachers alike, but some families are facing greater obstacles to accessing remote instruction than others.

As I've said before, this crisis hasn't created new problems so much as it's intensified long-existing inequities in our society. And nowhere is this more evident than in the widening digital learning gap.

Elected officials like Rep. Clarke did nothing to address this issue when they had the chance -- she was too busy raking in donations from Telecom giants like Spectrum and Comcast -- and now, millions of New York City's students are in danger of falling even further behind their more affluent peers. **[Our children can't be forced to pay the price for their greed: If you agree, will you support my fight to give all our students the opportunity they deserve?](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=express_lane_200)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******
Before the COVID-19 outbreak, nearly 300,000 NYC students lacked digital access. To close that gap, the Department of Education distributed approximately 175,000 remote learning devices -- but far too many students are still without the resources they need to log on. And for students who lack permanent housing, who lack reliable broadband access, and who lack designated devices that aren't being shared with other family members working and learning remotely, this pandemic threatens to upend all of the progress they might have made in the classroom this year.

Taking the nation's largest public education system online was never going to be easy. But if our elected officials had treated student homeless and the broadband gap in lower-income neighborhoods as urgent problems, instead of cozying up to corporations that are just looking to turn a profit, our students would be in a better position to succeed today. **[Brooklyn's working families deserve better. Support my campaign today with a $200, $100, or $50 donation, and let's fight for our students' futures.](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=)**

Best,
Adem

******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/V1VjirbqsqNi1DaRNfgpdosETF3DdLNUpqR-52CCQ5Q=/Jc1IspU5FxcYFUA4R8w4tj2Fo5k8g6xAeUdB0y0uHhA=)******

P.O. Box 130-427
Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Alongside Representative Ro Khanna, I'm proposing an Essential Workers Bill of Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Essential workers are the backbone of our nation's response to coronavirus -- and we need to have their backs. Alongside Representative Ro Khanna, I'm proposing an Essential Workers Bill of Rights to | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a4/1935258853/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Right now, we're seeing Americans stepping up, giving back, and taking care of each other -- and that's especially true when it comes to essential workers on the frontlines of this pandemic.

Doctors, nurses, other health care workers, grocery store and drug store employees, domestic workers, food service workers, government employees, janitorial staff, farm workers, delivery drivers, warehouse workers, transportation workers, child care workers, and other essential workers are putting their health on the line every time they clock in.

But many of them are working in high-risk conditions without appropriate protective equipment, adequate safety standards, or basic job protections. And reports show that these workers may be contracting COVID-19 at a higher rate than the general public.

Essential workers are the backbone of our nation's response to coronavirus -- and we need to have their backs.

**Alongside Representative Ro Khanna, I 'm proposing an Essential Workers Bill of Rights to ensure safe working conditions, fair pay, paid leave, health care security, support for child care, and more.

[I need you with me in the fight to get this done. Add your name if you agree: Congress's next coronavirus relief package must include an Essential Workers Bill of Rights to protect frontline workers during this public health emergency.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a7/1935258853/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExMlBfU0dOX0xBQl9FXzIwMjAwNDIxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-essential-workers?source=EMQ12P_SGN_LAB_E_20200421_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's what we're fighting for:
1. **Health and safety protections,** including personal protective equipment provided by employers at no cost to workers.

2. **Robust premium compensation** that provides meaningful compensation for essential work.

3. **Protections for collective bargaining agreements.**

4. **Truly universal paid sick leave and family and medical leave.**

5. **Protections for whistleblowers.** Workers who witness unsafe conditions must be able to openly identify their concerns and have them addressed, without fear of retaliation.

6. **An end to worker misclassification** that lets employers avoid providing the full suite of benefits and protections available to employees.

7. **Health care security.** We must use public programs to provide no-cost health care for all, regardless of immigration or insurance status, so that essential workers get the care they need during this crisis.

8. **Support for child care** to ensure essential workers have access to free, reliable, safe, healthy, and high-quality child care and commit robust funding to help struggling child care providers during this pandemic.

9. **Treat workers as experts.** Essential workers, and their unions and organizations, must be at the table in developing responses to coronavirus.

10. **Hold corporations accountable for protecting workers.** Taxpayer dollars that have been handed to corporations should go to help workers, not wealthy CEOs, rich shareholders, or the president's cronies.

Here's what it comes down to: We must recognize the critical contribution these essential workers are making to our health and our economy during this crisis.

Every day, essential workers are answering the call to protect the most vulnerable and keep life as we know it moving forward.

**Essential workers are fighting for us, so it is our responsibility to fight for them.

[Add your name, and together, we'll demand an Essential Workers Bill of Rights.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a7/1935258853/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExMlBfU0dOX0xBQl9FXzIwMjAwNDIxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-essential-workers?source=EMQ12P_SGN_LAB_E_20200421_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We have a long road ahead of us, but I'm confident that if we stand together, fight together, and persist, we will make it through this time of crisis.

Stay safe, and thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a7/1935258853/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExMlBfU0dOX0xBQl9FXzIwMjAwNDIxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-essential-workers?source=EMQ12P_SGN_LAB_E_20200421_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a6/1935258853/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a9/1935258853/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917a8/1935258853/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917ab/1935258853/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917aa/1935258853/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c6/45c30650/1f5bf49a0/66e917ad/1935258853/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

China caused this pandemic. They are responsible for every death and every lost job.China arrested the first doctors who warned about the virus. China lied about the danger of the virus spreading. It's time to elect leaders like James Mackler to fight for an America where gun violence no longer plagues families and communities."
\- Congresswoman Gabby Giffords**_ [_**JOIN GABBY GIFFORDS ON TEAM MACKLER TODAY ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16e/18d6a294/4cbd27b7/26d6166e/683912839/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200421?refcode=jme200421_nondonor&amount=5&recurring=1") James is a military veteran and a gun owner and he knows we can protect our 2nd Amendment rights and keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people. **Closing glaring loopholes** while **extending background checks to all gun sales** to make our communities safer is supported by James, Congresswoman Giffords, and 86% of Tennesseans. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17217831/186876359/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDM3OTc2ZS0yMjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNyNLn4Gi5N39jp1H7evlbIjB6VrAtMxaTQOOvQZ_vw=&emci=ab8849e4-d983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c437976e-2284-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Friend --

**Our nation’s health care workers still need urgent support.**

Earlier this month, we sent an email letting you know that hundreds of thousands of nurses and health care workers in San Diego and beyond lacked the appropriate protections to keep themselves and their patients safe.

**15 days have passed and unfortunately, we have not seen enough progress. Too many health care workers are still being forced to work in unsafe conditions -- many have been infected by COVID-19 due to a lack of protective equipment.**

[**Will you please join us in calling on lawmakers to support policies that keep our front line workers safe?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17217832/186876360/-1562447359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDM3OTc2ZS0yMjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNyNLn4Gi5N39jp1H7evlbIjB6VrAtMxaTQOOvQZ_vw=&emci=ab8849e4-d983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c437976e-2284-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) **[Protect Health Care Workers](https://www.signherenow.org/petition/support-health-care-workers/gomez)** Friend, we can’t let up in the fight to protect those who are protecting us, so Georgette is co-sponsoring a national petition demanding our health care workers receive: **» Protective gear (PPE)** like N95 respirator masks and face shields
**» Child care** so they can do their jobs knowing that their child is safe
**» Paid sick leave** to ensure they don’t won’t lose pay if they need time off [**Sign on to tell lawmakers to support policies that keep our front line workers safe >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17217833/186876361/-1562447359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDM3OTc2ZS0yMjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNyNLn4Gi5N39jp1H7evlbIjB6VrAtMxaTQOOvQZ_vw=&emci=ab8849e4-d983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c437976e-2284-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) **[Yes, I will sign on](https://www.signherenow.org/petition/support-health-care-workers/gomez/)** Thanks so much for all you do,

_Team Georgette_

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17217834/186876362/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDM3OTc2ZS0yMjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNyNLn4Gi5N39jp1H7evlbIjB6VrAtMxaTQOOvQZ_vw=&emci=ab8849e4-d983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c437976e-2284-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17217835/186876363/1147193815?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDM3OTc2ZS0yMjg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNyNLn4Gi5N39jp1H7evlbIjB6VrAtMxaTQOOvQZ_vw=). subject: Gov. Deal endorses Unterman for Congress
body:
Former Georgia Gov. Nathan Deal has endorsed my campaign! | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

I am SO excited to share this BIG endorsement with you:
---
|
---
“Renee Unterman has proven herself to be a passionate, courageous conservative fighter and I’m proud to endorse her campaign for Congress,” said Deal. “The people of Georgia deserve tough and thoughtful representatives, and I am confident Renee will deliver results for her constituents because, believe me, she never stops working. As our state works to provide every Georgian with a bright future, I believe Renee is the candidate who will always do what’s right and get the job done.” - Gov. Nathan Deal
|

I served in the State Senate during Gov. Deal’s two terms and we worked together closely to cut taxes, reform mental health treatment, combat human trafficking and crack down on illegal immigration. I'm humbled to receive his endorsement!

name: Team Tina
subject: marching orders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — Donald Trump is using irresponsible and inflammatory rhetoric to pressure leaders across the country to prematurely reopen our economy in the middle of this pandemic, which has already taken the lives of tens of thousands of Americans, and before the health crisis is fully addressed. Our Republican opponent, Jason Lewis, is following the President’s marching orders by making a dangerous decision to resume in-person campaign events and ignore social distancing guidelines, endangering the lives of our health care professionals, our first responders, our seniors, and countless others. At the “Liberate Minnesota” rally last Friday, Jason Lewis was shaking hands with protestors and encouraging people to take action in ways that endanger the health of others. But that’s not all — our Republican opponent has downplayed the seriousness of the virus from the start, comparing it to the flu, and calling it a “wintertime sickness.” Jason Lewis’ blatant disregard for the expertise of public health experts is dangerous. The truth is that Minnesota’s leaders are taking measures that are working — stay-at-home policies have helped us slow down the spread of the virus. We will only be able to get through this and reopen our economy safely if we continue to listen to the experts on how best to respond. Jason Lewis’ actions are an insult to Minnesotans working on the frontlines of this crisis and to our leaders working hard to flatten the curve. His decision also makes one thing crystal clear: Lewis’ irresponsible leadership has no place in the U.S. Senate. **If it makes financial sense for you, please make a contribution to Tina Smith’s re-election campaign to keep Jason Lewis out of the Senate. We must ensure our state continues to elect responsible leaders who will take this pandemic seriously — not endanger our lives and our economy.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17218380/186893134/-1005022767?refcode=tsm-em200421-lewis&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTkxNjE3ZC0yYTg0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fcXFn_08qqFOZ0croPB5KYt9mSPZ22gdOWvz-4B9sK4=)

clean_body: | Team — Donald Trump is using irresponsible and inflammatory rhetoric to pressure leaders across the country to prematurely reopen our economy in the middle of this pandemic, which has already taken the lives of tens of thousands of Americans, and before the health crisis is fully addressed. Our Republican opponent, Jason Lewis, is following the President’s marching orders by making a dangerous decision to resume in-person campaign events and ignore social distancing guidelines, endangering the lives of our health care professionals, our first responders, our seniors, and countless others. At the “Liberate Minnesota” rally last Friday, Jason Lewis was shaking hands with protestors and encouraging people to take action in ways that endanger the health of others. But that’s not all — our Republican opponent has downplayed the seriousness of the virus from the start, comparing it to the flu, and calling it a “wintertime sickness.” Jason Lewis’ blatant disregard for the expertise of public health experts is dangerous. The truth is that Minnesota’s leaders are taking measures that are working — stay-at-home policies have helped us slow down the spread of the virus. We will only be able to get through this and reopen our economy safely if we continue to listen to the experts on how best to respond. Jason Lewis’ actions are an insult to Minnesotans working on the frontlines of this crisis and to our leaders working hard to flatten the curve. His decision also makes one thing crystal clear: Lewis’ irresponsible leadership has no place in the U.S. Senate. If it makes financial sense for you, please make a contribution to Tina Smith’s re-election campaign to keep Jason Lewis out of the Senate. We must ensure our state continues to elect responsible leaders who will take this pandemic seriously — not endanger our lives and our economy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Only pitch in if you can afford to do so. Tina knows how difficult and unprecedented this moment is for you and your families. Take care of yourself and your loved ones. Thank you. — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
| []()

| | Peter --

Late last night, Donald Trump tweeted his resounding endorsement of our opponent, Mike Garcia.

We aren't surprised -- Garcia has sung Trump's praises constantly, and Trump loves few things more than flattery.

But what Trump's tweet does is signal to Republican donors that Garcia is business as usual. He's a carbon copy of Trump's voting record, which makes this election a referendum on how the country thinks Trump is doing during this crisis.

**And his tweet puts all eyes on us and this election -- especially because Trump asked his followers to donate directly to Garcia's campaign.**

**[We need you to step up right now if you are able to and help fight back against Garcia and Trump's fundraising machine. Send date: Monday, April 20 at 8:19 p.m.
From: Team Christy
Subject Line: BREAKING: Trump endorsed and is fundraising for Garcia on Twitter. Fight back now! >>

Trump just endorsed our opponent and is fundraising for him on Twitter [FIGHT BACK](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7b/29776869/a2b99db/569f533a/1735678278/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjFfdHJ1bXBlbmRvdHdlZXRLUi1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200421_trumpendotweetKR-s2")
---

Friend --

Instead of working on our nation's response to COVID-19, this is what Trump is doing tonight. Not just endorsing our opponent but directly fundraising for him:

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7b/29776869/a2b99db/569f533a/1735678278/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjFfdHJ1bXBlbmRvdHdlZXRLUi1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200421_trumpendotweetKR-s2")
---

Last week, dark money groups poured in nearly $900,000 to try and steal this seat.

Now Trump is firing up millions of his followers to flood Mike Garcia's coffers. There are just 3 weeks until this election. And Trump thinks he can flip this seat and help his own momentum going into November.

We cannot let that happen.

**[If you can, please make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can RIGHT NOW so we can fight back.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7b/29776869/a2b99db/569f533a/1735678278/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjFfdHJ1bXBlbmRvdHdlZXRLUi1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200421_trumpendotweetKR-s2")**

Hi Peter,
Hope you are well! Did you see Susan's email yesterday? She started a new Urgent Response Fund to fight back against the Far Left. **And she still needs 174 donors to join her!**
Susan's opponent is being funded by Far Left billionaires across the country. Right now, they are significantly outraising our campaign. Susan has decided that enough is enough -- we MUST catch up! We might not have the backing of Chuck Schumer and his elite friends, but we have **YOU.**
[**Please contribute anything you can to Susan 's Urgent Response Fund today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDIzMjA2ODIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI2ODA4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) She only needs 174 more donors to start the fund, so please join her in this fight!
The road to November is going to be much more difficult if we don't have the necessary funding right now. Susan must be prepared to respond with strength and speed to attacks from the Far Left -- no matter what they throw at her. That is why Susan's Urgent Response Fund is SO important. [**Please help Susan start building this fund and become one of the donors she needs today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDIzMjA2ODIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI2ODA4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you!
Amy Abbott
Finance Director

From: Susan Collins
Date: Monday, April 20, 2020
Subject: I need 500 donors today
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >

Dear Peter,
I wanted to send a personal message to you about the current status of my campaign.
Out-of-state donors from across the country are funneling millions of dollars into Maine to defeat me. Far left billionaires have teamed up with Senator Chuck Schumer to send unprecedented amounts of money attacking me in Maine. They have spent more money here than in any other state in the country.
That is why I am starting an **Urgent Response Fund** to the Far Left's dark money that is flowing into Maine's election. We cannot allow Chuck Schumer and his hand picked candidate to determine who controls the Senate in 2020. We MUST fight back. [**I am looking to activate 500 loyal supporters to help me start this fund today. Please contribute anything you can afford and become a founding donor!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDIzMjA2ODIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI2ODA4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

They know that Maine is key to flipping the Senate in 2020. We must be prepared and have all the resources necessary to win this election. **We cannot give in to these kinds of tactics.** [**Please join me and become one of the founding donors in my Urgent Response Fund today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzMjA2ODIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI2ODA4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If we work together, we can catch up!_

To unsubscribe click Hi Peter, Hope you are well! Did you see Susan's email yesterday? She started a new Urgent Response Fund to fight back against the Far Left. And she still needs 174 donors to join her! Susan's opponent is being funded by Far Left billionaires across the country. Right now, they are significantly outraising our campaign. Susan has decided that enough is enough -- we MUST catch up! We might not have the backing of Chuck Schumer and his elite friends, but we have YOU. She only needs 174 more donors to start the fund, so please join her in this fight! The road to November is going to be much more difficult if we don't have the necessary funding right now. Susan must be prepared to respond with strength and speed to attacks from the Far Left -- no matter what they throw at her. That is why Susan's Urgent Response Fund is SO important. Thank you! Amy Abbott Finance Director \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Susan Collins Date: Monday, April 20, 2020 Subject: I need 500 donors today To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com > Dear Peter, I wanted to send a personal message to you about the current status of my campaign. Out-of-state donors from across the country are funneling millions of dollars into Maine to defeat me. Far left billionaires have teamed up with Senator Chuck Schumer to send unprecedented amounts of money attacking me in Maine. They have spent more money here than in any other state in the country. That is why I am starting an Urgent Response Fund to the Far Left's dark money that is flowing into Maine's election. We cannot allow Chuck Schumer and his hand picked candidate to determine who controls the Senate in 2020. We MUST fight back. They know that Maine is key to flipping the Senate in 2020. We must be prepared and have all the resources necessary to win this election. We cannot give in to these kinds of tactics. If we work together, we can catch up! Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) is the strong leader Democrats need to win this race and take back the Senate, but Republicans are pulling out all the stops to defeat him. For him to fight back against GOP attacks and flip Georgia blue, he needs your immediate grassroots support. Right now, we're falling incredibly short of our crucial fundraising goal, and time is running out before the midnight deadline. "" "" With Republicans spending millions to defeat us, we'll only win this race with grassroots support from people like you. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Protecting our frontline workers
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
My goal is to reopen the economy as soon as possible without risking another surge. Our team has been working 24/7 in order to get everyone back to work as quickly - and safely - as possible. Today, I'm going to speak a bit more about progress we're making in two key areas: securing PPE and housing for frontline workers.
To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gKE7P81xFZiS5nnxpekNh3rrWxva65TPv-zM42odRb0uG0HEyDoJBrUQBIgEdFQIuo3qgRTzszWep9wMWHAXc8mC9L5kn4NIXXwiKInoT_-ftNMiG2yPWRTaFu6tjnuPOwGtjJhShR_lf-hYZ1JMkJyLIB9xfW4CbObsMdpK9v78ig3ZfoAQ-AjiAPibKP3BKZlSepy45yM=&c=6m_8ZaaBA2PpdoEL5ZHjBsmdNETqLJqfz7tXjwVPN7B7ehdH21WrCQ==&ch=k_wAoY560ZtkUBGb8gh4zPGyMSyI9i5knnlelEGkQlnM71OzNlpYkA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gKE7P81xFZiS5nnxpekNh3rrWxva65TPv-zM42odRb0uG0HEyDoJBrUQBIgEdFQIuo3qgRTzszWep9wMWHAXc8mC9L5kn4NIXXwiKInoT_-ftNMiG2yPWRTaFu6tjnuPOwGtjJhShR_lf-hYZ1JMkJyLIB9xfW4CbObsMdpK9v78ig3ZfoAQ-AjiAPibKP3BKZlSepy45yM=&c=6m_8ZaaBA2PpdoEL5ZHjBsmdNETqLJqfz7tXjwVPN7B7ehdH21WrCQ==&ch=k_wAoY560ZtkUBGb8gh4zPGyMSyI9i5knnlelEGkQlnM71OzNlpYkA==)
---
| It's critical that our healthcare workers have enough PPE to protect them through a surge. Our goal is to have at least a month of critical supplies on hand at all times. Our health care workers are showing up to work every day, working long hours and putting themselves at risk in order to save lives. We owe it to them to ensure that they are properly protected.
That's why we are laser-focused on getting a steady supply of PPE in Rhode Island. In just the past two weeks, we have received shipments totaling more than 1.5 million surgical masks. That brings out total on hand as of today to nearly 2 million. This means that healthcare workers across our state - in hospitals, in nursing homes, in urgent care centers, in sites that are serving as respiratory clinics - can now change out their surgical masks on a daily basis. Now, that's not a silver bullet- we still need more masks. But this is an important milestone in keeping these workers safe.
We also need more caregivers during this critical time. I'm encouraging anyone with a healthcare background who would like to return to the field temporarily to contact us. We are searching near and far to fill these critical staffing needs. The state is working with Skills for Rhode Island's Future to help recruit caregivers. [Please visit SkillsForRI.com to view opportunities.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gKE7P81xFZiS5nnxpekNh3rrWxva65TPv-zM42odRb0uG0HEyDoJBuAhEFlhBAHAyZciJKQYRlLkM9qb_WjCR59PMCgdG4Cx75oiSEjuzNg8pnT0RLZlahP2fNiJZCOBPsjBy8SsjQZaCGG_tZs8YQ==&c=6m_8ZaaBA2PpdoEL5ZHjBsmdNETqLJqfz7tXjwVPN7B7ehdH21WrCQ==&ch=k_wAoY560ZtkUBGb8gh4zPGyMSyI9i5knnlelEGkQlnM71OzNlpYkA==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gKE7P81xFZiS5nnxpekNh3rrWxva65TPv-zM42odRb0uG0HEyDoJBuAhEFlhBAHACX5oEbFqxvtjHOOy2f601F8yhLI-j40ETc97uBEt3Xf4l7bkDB8q4mtGAj1WMQtpy9IpoLLEkoAXxg2p8NxNge2css8BT8rv3-ZaSQFRFxFjP6FATST8LX3D5Vf5lvwCVQBQ51ATaYmfVUtmA6XPnw==&c=6m_8ZaaBA2PpdoEL5ZHjBsmdNETqLJqfz7tXjwVPN7B7ehdH21WrCQ==&ch=k_wAoY560ZtkUBGb8gh4zPGyMSyI9i5knnlelEGkQlnM71OzNlpYkA==)
---
| We owe our frontline workers a debt we can never repay--they're coming face-to-mask with this virus every day as they work to keep Rhode Islanders safe. And we've heard from many that are worried about going home and potentially exposing family members. Last week we launched [RIHavens.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gKE7P81xFZiS5nnxpekNh3rrWxva65TPv-zM42odRb0uG0HEyDoJBrUQBIgEdFQIBHDR3w-D-I7vDB9-7Dmn4cJwZcJLq1MFRPTPGvBZiagTw3PPl7wksBYtQVVx3H0snHOy5IJd6BY=&c=6m_8ZaaBA2PpdoEL5ZHjBsmdNETqLJqfz7tXjwVPN7B7ehdH21WrCQ==&ch=k_wAoY560ZtkUBGb8gh4zPGyMSyI9i5knnlelEGkQlnM71OzNlpYkA==) to connect frontline workers in need a place to stay with hotel rooms at significantly discounted rates. We know this isn't a solution for everyone.
Today, I'm proud to announce that we've partnered with Brown University to provide free single-occupancy dormitory housing to frontline workers. Brown has made more than 700 rooms available at no charge to the state. I cannot thank them enough for stepping up in this critical moment. We're so grateful to have them as a partner in this fight. As anyone who's ever lived in a dorm knows, this is not the most glamorous option: rooms are basic and bathrooms are communal. But Brown has done a fantastic job working with us to ensure that only a couple of people are ever sharing a single common space.
I'm grateful to every person, group, business, and organization that has stepped up to help us handle this crisis. Rhode Island is at its best when we work together, and the selfless actions of people across our state are helping us to keep our friends, family, and neighbors safe.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gKE7P81xFZiS5nnxpekNh3rrWxva65TPv-zM42odRb0uG0HEyDoJBuAhEFlhBAHASe-bX0X9ZJJdu3R03yE4zx2_lpXzDQ8TnjtGyoUmQfS9yEIv67zMS1kQ2J_fcJukGF9GNmIZiHRWmUKC0Mud3h697ZdiSHeygVV3mKFnFIcQeN45KH2htk1ztpRY1Neruul8V3u2OH4ucbvfBNkH-DJntX-XWJmFRILJ2nFRhdx7-MAsVCkN9fY7dsmSTn3T_hLQ-tBHOhk_-To9ce2OhSq___CHWce5xEavoWp0MWCxgVdEdlYhNP04uzAiylE_hWF5V0gxVWg=&c=6m_8ZaaBA2PpdoEL5ZHjBsmdNETqLJqfz7tXjwVPN7B7ehdH21WrCQ==&ch=k_wAoY560ZtkUBGb8gh4zPGyMSyI9i5knnlelEGkQlnM71OzNlpYkA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1c6/18e32a7f/4f4abcdc/7b21e395/3715217330/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump vs. the political class
body:
At a time when most Americans are discouraged from all nonessential travel within our borders, it is responsible and fair to limit travel across... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dcb15494a5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 21, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump vs. the political class**

**As America wages war** on the deadly Coronavirus, President Trump announced last night that he will temporarily suspend immigration into the United States.

**Nearly 80 percent** of Americans support this common-sense measure to protect our country, according to a recent _USA Today_ /Ipsos poll. At a time when most Americans are discouraged from all nonessential travel _within_ our borders, it is responsible and fair to limit travel _across_ those borders, as well.

**The political class** doesn’t do common sense, however. Democrat “leaders” such as Senators Elizabeth Warren and Tim Kaine [joined CNN pundits](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1ff34c404&e=3ee4985eea) in attacking the decision. They couldn’t make any case against it, of course: It’s tough to argue that borders should be open while American citizens are locked down. So they just made up insults instead.

**Sen. Warren accused** the President of “racism” and “xenophobia”—[exactly what Democrat leaders did](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9883737f81&e=3ee4985eea) when President Trump restricted travel from China in January.

**Democrats were wrong** at the start of this crisis, and they’re wrong now. Unlike the left, President Trump will take every action necessary to protect the American people.

**Both lives and livelihoods** are at stake. At a time when many people are out of work because of Coronavirus, it’s more important than ever to protect jobs for our citizens. Mass immigration risks hurting the wages of blue-collar workers, [multiple studies show](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d316cf7b10&e=3ee4985eea). As these Americans look to bounce back from the Coronavirus pandemic, our leaders must help them in every way possible.

**President Trump** is doing it. There’s still time for Democrat leaders to join him.

[Press Secretary: Even Paul Krugman knows that immigration lowers wages.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87af362054&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## 🎬 **Surgeon General to Americans: ‘Keep at it’**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cc14fbf38&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **To all Americans** helping slow the spread of Coronavirus, Surgeon General Jerome Adams has a message: “Thank you for following the President’s [Coronavirus guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e31a5267d8&e=3ee4985eea).”

**Social distancing** and other mitigation actions are working, he says. “We know we’re flattening the curve and saving lives, and it is all thanks to you.”

**We must** **stay vigilant** to defeat this virus. To protect you and your loved ones, continue practicing strict personal hygiene and staying home as much as possible—especially if you or a member of your household is feeling sick.

**“We continue** to be encouraged that many of the areas hardest hit by the virus appear to have turned the corner,” President Trump said yesterday. “Recent deaths are down very, very substantially.”

**Each day,** America is gaining ground in this fight. The Trump Administration wants to keep that momentum going. All of us, no matter our age, has a role to play:
* 🎬 **If you’ve recovered** from COVID-19, [here’s how you can help others](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a32be7df94&e=3ee4985eea).

* 🎬 **If you have children,** [the Surgeon General has a message for you](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=534908fe8e&e=3ee4985eea).

* 🎬 **Don’t neglect guidelines** to avoid large groups. [Here’s why](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c00e5426e7&e=3ee4985eea).

* 🎬 **Help k****eep seniors safe**! [See a special message from the First Lady](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4bccd12814&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump, Vice President Pence, and members of the White House Coronavirus Task Force, deliver remarks to the press** | April 20, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96e50303b8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6da8fb08cb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c7dac7cfe5)
---

subject: Pelosi wants to expand her power into Dayton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDIzMjE2MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTc0MjI3NDg3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Pelosi's plan is simple: expand her majority so that she can enact the socialist policies of the far Left.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDIzMjE2MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI3NDg3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDIzMjE2MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI3NDg3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Nancy Pelosi and the far Left movement are targeting this race. Pelosi and her campaign arm, the DCCC, have listed this seat as one of the top congressional districts to flip in November. Pelosi's plan is simple: [_**expand her majority so that she can enact the socialist policies of the far Left**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIzMjE2MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI3NDg3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
Peter, Mike Turner fights for all of us in Congress. He has protected area jobs at Wright-Patt, and even helped provide more funding to the states #1 employer!
[_**Can Mike Turner count on you to chip in $15, $10, $5, or even $1 today to defend Dayton? >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDIzMjE2MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI3NDg3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Even during these trying times, Mike is working to help protect American workers and ensure they have the care they need while facing the Coronavirus pandemic.
Meanwhile, Nancy Pelosi is focused instead on partisan politics and which congressional district she plans to pour money into next.
[**_Our team needs your help now more than ever, Peter. If you can afford it, please chip in any amount you can today!_**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIzMjE2MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjI3NDg3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
